title: ExtremeView
description: Mod that increases maximum view distance for Minecraft Beta 1.7.3
body:
Mod that increases maximum view distance for Minecraft Beta 1.7.3. Minimum rendering distance is 8 blocks radius and maximum is near 1000 blocks. Default distance settings button was replaced with slider.

**Warning:** the mod does not increase performance on rendering large areas, it only makes view distance configurable
